title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMManMade
description: An artificial structure from OpenStreetMap tagged with man_made=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMManMade

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier.

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification.

manMadeType.description: Property. The OSM man_made tag classifying the structure. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:man_made'

manMadeHeight.description: Property. Height of the structure in metres. Maps to the OSM 'height' tag. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:height'

material.description: Property. The primary material the feature is made of. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:material'

operator.description: Property. The entity responsible for operation.

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
